1794600.name: Dark Tales from México: Prelude. Just a Dream... with The Sack Man
1794600.description:
DARK TALES FROM MÉXICO
Is a saga of 10 short games in a 3D Survival Horror style, based on tales from the real Mexican folklore in which every monster it´s originally a physical sculpture made and painted by hand and then 3D scanned using photogrammetry. This game is the Prelude of the saga.

"JUST A DREAM... WITH THE SACK MAN" (THIS EPISODE)
Dreams and meanings. Meanings and nightmares. What does it mean to die in a nightmare?

Alma is asleep, she believes that what she sees, hears and feels is just a dream, a nightmare in which she must go through a labyrinth and where she must escape from the SACK MAN, a monster from a story that her grandmother told her when she was little and with which she had not dreamed since then. What Alma does not know is that this time, if she does not manage to get out of the labyrinth, she will never be able to wake up again.

Walk with Alma through this labyrinth of progressive assembly (it is different each time you go through it) capable of entering the subconscious to make you face your deepest memories and traumas.
1794600.supported_languages:
英语*, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
